name: Zhu Xi Zhuge Nu Timing
author: Yufka1954
reasoning: The most-liked Zhu Xi build this season: a crossbow (Zhuge Nu) timing attack off the boosted Zhu Xi economy that hits before most civs stabilize.

notes: Build all eco buildings closeby for better tax collection
Build mill with all 5 villager china and rally all sheep onto it, supervise building mill with imperial official
7 villager china on sheep , 7th villager china builds village
1 villager china on sheep rest villager china on wood , collect taxes from mill at about 130 gold
Age up with 1 sheep villager china with jiangnan tower 2 ,rally 3 sheep villager china onto wood
Collect taxes when you have enough food for villager china production
Train a imperial official and built lumber camp , supervise on building lumber camp with imperial official and rally villager china onto wood until 9
Don't forget to collect taxes for blacksmith upgrades, decide what units you want to train in each scenario, have fun :D
Start building 3 archery range and further barracks when needed at jiangnan tower 2 , set jiangnan tower 2 to City Guard
Collect taxes so you can afford double broadaxe , rally until 8 villager china on sheep and get horticulture
Build blacksmith and start training zhuge nu 2 , rally villager china onto wood until 13
Get 1 imperial official and rally villager china onto gold until 6, at 7-10 zhuge nu 2 go out to harass enemy gold and stop production for steeled arrow and iron undermesh
Rally villager china onto food now, build village at 46 supply, start zhuge nu 2 and siege engineering , built new lumber camp forward for max income
